# Contractor IP Checklist

Use this checklist before any contractor, freelancer, expert, designer, or developer contributes to YogaPlatform.

## Must-Have Clauses

- Full identification of the contractor and scope of work.
- Clear assignment of intellectual property rights in deliverables.
- Confidentiality obligations.
- Warranty that the deliverables are original or properly licensed.
- Warranty that the deliverables do not knowingly infringe third-party rights.
- Permission to use name, likeness, and materials if the contractor appears in product content.
- Rules for portfolio use, if allowed.
- Payment terms tied to delivery and rights transfer where appropriate.

## Deliverables To Cover Explicitly

- Code
- UI/UX design
- Text and editorial materials
- Videos and photos
- Audio and podcast materials
- Course/program structure
- Brand assets
- Prompt libraries, recommendation logic, AI workflows

## Before Work Starts

- Verify legal name and contact details.
- Confirm whether any third-party materials will be used.
- Define whether the work is exclusive or reusable elsewhere.
- Confirm storage location for source files and approvals.

## Before Final Payment

- Confirm all source files were delivered.
- Confirm rights assignment language is signed.
- Confirm third-party assets used by the contractor are documented.
- Confirm no unpaid licenses or usage restrictions remain.

## Important Note

This checklist is not a substitute for a lawyer-drafted agreement. It is the minimum internal control layer to avoid ownership ambiguity.
